'''鈭歭-d-v-v''' ('''kaladvevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:aluminumize|aluminumize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-d-v-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aluminumize|aluminumize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-d-v-v
|-
! Lemma
| kaladvevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiladvevoko|thiladvevoko]] || [[word:jiladvevoko|jiladvevoko]] || [[word:shiladvevoko|shiladvevoko]] || [[word:kiladvevoko|kiladvevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuladvevoko|thuthuladvevoko]] || [[word:jujuladvevoko|jujuladvevoko]] || [[word:shushuladvevoko|shushuladvevoko]] || [[word:kukuladvevoko|kukuladvevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
